A CONFIRMED EF0 TORNADO BREIFLY TOUCHED DOWN IN THE COLONIAL ESTATES NEIGHBORHOOD OF RIVERVIEW. AN NWS STORM SURVEY FOUND A DAMAGE TRACK APPROXIMATELY 750 YARDS LONG AND AS MUCH AS 25 YARDS WIDE.
